basic_details.job_title: IIT Ropar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology, Ropar (IIT Ropar)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology, Ropar (IIT Ropar) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology, Ropar has released the official notification for 1 Junior Research Fellow posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Chemical/ Mechanical/ Civil/ Aerospace/relevant Engineering or M.Sc. in Physics/Mathematics with GATE/CSIR UGC NET, Bachelor's degree in Chemical/ Mechanical/ Civil/ Aerospace/relevant Engineering with GATE/NET score
qualification.details: Master's degree in Chemical/ Mechanical/ Civil/ Aerospace/relevant Engineering area or M.Sc. in Physics/Mathematics with a GATE or CSIR UGC NET qualified score (at least 65% marks or 6.5 CGPA) OR Bachelor's degree in Chemical/ Mechanical/ Civil/ Aerospace/relevant Engineering with minimum CGPA of 6.5 (or 65% marks) with GATE/NET score.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Ropar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Ropar Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Ropar Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Ropar Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Ropar Junior Research Fellow Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Master's degree in Chemical/ Mechanical/ Civil/ Aerospace/relevant Engineering area or M.Sc. in Physics/Mathematics with a GATE or CSIR UGC NET qualified score (at least 65% marks or 6.5 CGPA) OR Bachelor's degree in Chemical/ Mechanical/ Civil/ Aerospace/relevant Engineering with minimum CGPA of 6.5 (or 65% marks) with GATE/NET score.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Ropar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Ropar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Ropar Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Ropar is 31st July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Junior Research Fellow position will receive a monthly salary of Rs 37,000 plus HRA.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for this role?
faq.answer: A Master's degree in a relevant engineering or science field with a valid GATE or CSIR UGC NET score is required. Alternatively, a Bachelor's degree in a relevant engineering field with a GATE/NET score is also accepted.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the IIT Ropar Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete application along with all required documents to the specified email address before the deadline.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position will involve an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Ropar.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Junior Research Fellow at IIT Ropar is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Ropar located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology, Ropar is located in Rupnagar, Punjab, with the pincode 140001.

faq.question: Q10. Will there be any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for any such information.
